meanings.definition: the perception that something has occurred or some state exists
examples: early detection can often lead to a cure

meanings.definition: becoming aware of something via the senses
perceive by a physical sensation, e.g., coming from the skin or muscles
examples: She felt an object brushing her arm
She felt the heat when she got out of the car

meanings.definition: detect some circumstance or entity automatically
examples: This robot can sense the presence of people in the room

meanings.definition: become aware of not through the senses but instinctively

examples: I sensed the real meaning of his letter
